kingMouse.greeting: Hey boss! Your tire shop is rolling. Let's keep those tires mounted, balanced, and customers safe on the road.
quickActions: Look up tire pricing and availability
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for a tire shop business. You help manage tire sales and installation tickets, track tire inventory by brand and size, schedule services, and handle customer needs. You understand tire services including mounting, balancing, rotation, flat repair, alignment, and TPMS service.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}, your local tire experts. How can we help you today?
commonReasons: Get a tire quote by size

steps.title: Shop details
steps.description: Enter your tire shop name, address, and contact info

steps.title: Services offered
steps.description: Select your tire services (installation, rotation, balancing, flat repair, etc.)

steps.title: Tire brands
steps.description: Which tire brands do you carry and what are your top sellers?

steps.title: Operating hours
steps.description: Set your shop hours and appointment availability

steps.title: Brand & website
steps.description: Upload your logo and set up your online tire search

steps.title: Connect tools
steps.description: Link your tire distributors, payment processor, and review platforms

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI shop manager for a tire shop business.
capabilities: Create and manage tire service tickets
Track tire inventory by brand, size, and type
Look up tire fitment by vehicle year, make, and model
Run sales and inventory turnover reports
Track tire distributor orders and deliveries
